global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on the NovaPay brand and its benefits.
global.main_message: Promoting NovaPay's secure and simple payment service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A prominent logo featuring the text 'NovaPay' in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: Secure & simple
elements.description: A large, clear headline that reads 'Secure & simple' in a friendly font.

elements.label: No hidden fees
elements.description: A smaller text line stating 'No hidden fees' beneath the headline, emphasizing transparency.
